example.name: 1/24, No Cliff
example.description: Shares vest monthly for the next 24 months on the same day as the start date.

id.description: The identifier of the vesting schedule template.

issuerId.description: The identifier of the issuer to which this vesting schedule template belongs.

name.description: The name of the vesting schedule template.

description.description: The description of the vesting schedule template.

vestingScheduleType.description:
Types of vesting schedule templates.

 - DATE: Vesting schedule with tranches based on calendar dates
 - MILESTONE: Vesting schedule with tranches based on a milestone condition being achieved
 - HYBRID: vesting schedule with a combination of date-based tranches and performance conditions

description: Details of a vesting schedule template.
